hits.name: neurofibromatosis type 1
hits.description: A tumor predisposition syndrome caused by pathogenic variants in the NF1 gene, characterized by cafe-au-lait macules, neurofibromas, and an increased risk of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors.

hits.name: neurofibroma
hits.description: A benign nerve-sheath tumor arising from Schwann cells and fibroblasts of peripheral nerves.

hits.name: neurofibromatosis
hits.description: A group of genetic disorders characterized by the growth of tumors along nerves.

hits.name: neurofibromatosis type 2
hits.description: A tumor predisposition syndrome caused by pathogenic variants in the NF2 gene.
